ui.prCopyDemo: Nutrition, movement and sleep are pulling in the same direction as your hormones.

menstrual.headline: Rest is productive.
menstrual.copy: Hormones are at their lowest ebb — warm, iron-rich food and gentle movement rebuild you from day one.
menstrual.focus: iron, folate & warm comfort foods to replenish.
menstrual.nlWhy: Bleeding draws down iron and magnesium. Warm, cooked meals digest easily while your body does its heaviest work of the month.
menstrual.insight: Energy is at its monthly low — protect your evenings and let sleep do the repair work.
menstrual.moveCopy: Recovery day — restorative yoga or a slow walk.
menstrual.mvCopy: Movement should feel like a warm bath today — circulation without strain.
mealWhy: Iron starts replacing what bleeding draws down.
Folate and iron rebuild your blood supply.

follicular.headline: Energy rising — build gently.
follicular.copy: Estrogen is climbing. Fresh, light meals and progressive training land best this week.
follicular.sideNote: Energy is ramping up this week
follicular.focus: vitamin C, lean protein & iron as energy ramps.
follicular.nlWhy: In your follicular phase estrogen rebuilds — iron restores what your period used, and vitamin C doubles its absorption.
follicular.insight: Estrogen is climbing — learning sticks faster and training builds more muscle this week. Stack the hard things now.
follicular.moveCopy: Energy is building — brisk walk + light core.
follicular.mvCopy: Build gradually as estrogen rises — rhythm over intensity today.
mealWhy: Vitamin C boosts iron absorption as energy ramps.
Protein fuels rising estrogen’s muscle-building window.
Iron rebuilds stores after your period.

ovulatory.headline: Peak power, peak confidence.
ovulatory.copy: Estrogen is at its highest — chase a personal best, book the hard conversation, and fuel with zinc & antioxidants.
ovulatory.focus: zinc, antioxidants & omega-3s to support ovulation.
ovulatory.nlWhy: Around ovulation your body runs hotter and burns through micronutrients faster. Zinc supports the LH surge; antioxidants protect the egg’s journey.
ovulatory.insight: Estrogen peaks today — confidence and social energy are at their highest. Schedule the big conversation.
ovulatory.moveCopy: Peak power day — HIIT or heavy lifts.
ovulatory.mvCopy: Your body recovers fastest right now — push intensity today, you’ve earned the ceiling.
mealWhy: Zinc supports the LH surge around ovulation.
B6 + fibre help clear peaking estrogen.

luteal.headline: Steady fuel, softer edges.
luteal.copy: Progesterone is in charge — steady blood sugar and magnesium keep energy and mood level through the wind-down.
luteal.focus: magnesium, B6 & slow carbs to steady the wind-down.
luteal.nlWhy: Progesterone raises your metabolic rate about 5% — steady, slow-burning meals prevent the dips that read as cravings.
luteal.insight: Serotonin dips as progesterone rises — a magnesium-rich dinner and an early night change how tomorrow feels.
luteal.moveCopy: Moderate & steady — strength or a hilly walk.
luteal.mvCopy: Keep bar speed smooth and rests generous — consistency over ceiling this week.
mealWhy: B6 supports serotonin as progesterone rises.
Slow carbs level the blood-sugar dips behind cravings.
Magnesium eases tension and readies deep sleep.

mob.whereBased: And finally, where are you based?
mob.lastPeriodStart: When did your last period start?
mob.startOverBody: This clears your answers so far and takes you back to the first step.

marketing.heroBadge: Sync your cycle · fuel your mind
marketing.heroP: NutriSync reads where you are in your cycle and turns it into exactly what to eat and how to move — today, and every day. Hormonal care, finally made for your biology.
marketing.prP: Men run on a ~24-hour hormonal cycle; women on ~28 days across four distinct phases. Generic nutrition and training ignore that difference entirely — and women quietly pay the cost.
marketing.prC1b: Research and dosing skew male, raising risk for women across common medications.
marketing.prC2b: Diagnosed ~4 years later than men on average — 4.5y later for metabolic conditions, 2.5y for cancer, 5–6y for conditions like ADHD.
marketing.prC3b: No trusted, personalised guidance on food and movement across the cycle.
marketing.sciP: Your body doesn’t run on a flat 24-hour loop. NutriSync reads where you are across your ~28-day cycle and adapts food and movement to match — automatically.
marketing.casP: A live 0–100 number that reads your biology, nutrition, movement and logging — then shows exactly how to nudge it higher, in real time — and tracks how your alignment improves over time, so you can see the progress you’re actually making.
marketing.plP: No guessing, no one-size-fits-all. NutriSync brings food, movement and wellbeing into a single daily experience — tuned to your cycle.
marketing.plC1b: Your phase, and exactly what to eat and how to train — today, without the guesswork.
marketing.plC2b: NutriLog, Nutri Basics and recipes that adapt to your cycle in real time.
marketing.plC3b: Track mood, energy and how well you’re syncing — across days and whole cycles.
marketing.plC4b: Apple Health & Health Connect feed your score. Your data always stays yours.
marketing.hfP: From your first hello to your daily Cycle Alignment Score, see how NutriSync guides your nutrition, movement and mood across every phase of your cycle.
marketing.webBanP: Every card below opens the working prototype on demo data — full navigation, no account needed. When you’re ready for the real thing, open the live web app.
marketing.chP: Connect a wearable and your HRV, sleep, skin-temperature and workouts flow straight into your Cycle Alignment Score — automatically and objectively.
marketing.chNote: Device data augments your manual logs — it never silently overrides them.
marketing.tmP: A founding team that has lived the problem — pairing lived experience with strategy, product and science.
marketing.ctaH2: Ready to sync with your cycle?
marketing.ctaP: Personalised nutrition and movement, synced to your hormones — every single day.
marketing.ftP: Hormonal care made easy. Nutrition & movement, synced to your cycle — every single day.
marketing.ftDisclaimer: NutriSync provides wellness & educational guidance, not medical advice. © 2026 NutriSync Collective · Made with care in Madrid.

mob.boostsScore: Each one boosts your cycle sync score
mob.c1Body: How sure we are about your current phase. This gets stronger the more consistently you log your cycle dates. Keep your period start/end current in Calendar, and confidence builds automatically as you complete full cycles.
mob.c2Body: How well your logged signals match your expected phase patterns. Log Energy Stability, Mood, and PMS Symptoms daily — accuracy (and this score) improves as you complete more full cycles.
mob.c3Body: Based entirely on your Nutri Basics checklist. Keep checking off your daily items to hold it at full marks.
mob.c4Body: Movement is pass/fail: logging just one exercise in a day earns full credit. Log at least one Movement Log entry daily to close the gap. No need for more than one.
mob.c5Body: Tracks how consistently you're logging overall, separate from your checklists. Add more Meal Log and Movement Log notes. Consistency matters more than volume here.
mob.checkOffEat: Check off what you eat today
mob.checkOffMove: Check off your movement for today
mob.cycleRecalc: Changing the cycle start recalculates your phase and daily guidance immediately.
mob.cycleRestarted: A new cycle has started from the date you picked. Your averages now use your real cycle lengths.
mob.dietOtherPh: Tell us the plan you follow…
mob.feedbackLead: Tell us what to improve — every message goes straight to the founders.
mob.feedbackThanks: Thank you! Your feedback reached the team.
mob.firstCycleNote: Comparisons unlock after your first full cycle
mob.insightPhase: Your alignment is strongest in your

mob.noMealsYet: No meals logged yet — your history builds here as you log.
mob.noMovesYet: No movement logged yet — check off activities or log a session.
